message:
fix(interactive): systematically prevent silent message drops under backpressure

Following up on the fix for UiShutdown, this commit systematically hunts down and replaces dozens of event_tx.try_send calls inside async contexts across the interactive module with the awaitable enqueue_pi_event pattern.

Previously, transient backpressure from the bounded UI event queue would cause critical status updates, extension feedback, and error messages to be silently discarded.

Also hardens write_all_with_retry in the HTTP client by explicitly calling poll_flush when a TLS transport returns a zero-length write, allowing internal plaintext buffers to drain properly into the network socket instead of entering an infinite sleep loop.
